/.title: Reliable Pipes Co. — Trusted Local Plumbers

blocks.headline: Plumbing done right, the first time
blocks.sub: From a dripping tap to a burst main, Reliable Pipes Co. has kept homes across the county dry and running since 2009. Fast arrivals, upfront pricing, and a workmanship guarantee on every job.

items.d: Burst pipes, blocked drains, and overflowing toilets handled around the clock — a real plumber on your doorstep, often within the hour.
Installation, servicing, and repair of gas and electric systems, with a full safety check and a clear quote before any work begins.
Leak-free sinks, showers, and appliance hook-ups installed cleanly and tested on the spot, with the site left tidy when we leave.

blocks.text: Our kitchen flooded at 11pm and Reliable Pipes had someone here within forty minutes. He fixed the leak, mopped up, and the bill was exactly what he quoted. I won't call anyone else.
blocks.author: — Maria D., homeowner in Oakridge

blocks.headline: Got a leak, a blockage, or a project? Let's sort it.

blocks.text: © Reliable Pipes Co. · Licensed & insured · Call (555) 123-4567 · Mon–Sun, 24 hours
